ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient from whom the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., TCGA, external) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "tumor_type" INTEGER /* Type of tumor (e.g., breast cancer, lung cancer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  "quality_control_status" TEXT /* Status of quality control checks (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "research_notes" TEXT /* Notes from researchers about the sample */,
  "biomarker_status" TEXT /* Status of biomarker analysis (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_sample_type FOREIGN KEY ("sample_type") REFERENCES sample_types ("sample_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_tumor_type FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_type") REFERENCES tumor_types ("tumor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_measures" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value to assess the significance of the immune cell composition data */,
  "pearson_correlation" REAL /* Pearson correlation coefficient to measure the linear relationship between immune cell types */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root mean square error (RMSE) to measure the accuracy of the immune cell composition data */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for statistical analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistical analysis was performed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the patient */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's family medical history */,
  "lifestyle_factors" TEXT /* Lifestyle factors that may influence the condition (e.g., smoking, diet) */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of patient consent for data use (e.g., given, not given) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_types" (
  "tumor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor type */,
  "tumor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tumor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tumor type */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Incidence rate of the tumor type */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate of the tumor type */,
  "median_survival" TEXT /* Median survival time for patients with the tumor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_types" (
  "sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample type */,
  "sample_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample type */,
  "source_institution" TEXT /* Institution from which the sample was sourced */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the source institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "immune_cells" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each immune cell type */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the immune cell type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the immune cell type */,
  "biological_function" TEXT /* Biological function of the immune cell type */,
  "disease_association" TEXT /* Association with specific diseases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_immune_cell_composition" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each immune cell type */,
  "proportion" REAL /* Proportion of the immune cell type in the sample */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used for measurement */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory where the measurement was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_statistical_measures" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "measure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical measure type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistical measure */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used for statistical analysis */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory where the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "measure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measure_types" (
  "measure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure type */,
  "measure_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure type */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the statistical measure (e.g., %, unitless) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_type_id")
)
